race.comment: ADMIRE FLUKE (3) returns after a spell of four-and-a-half months. He's a lightly raced 3yo who showed ability last time in. He can be an improver this time around and the mile looks a nice spot for him fresh. CUBAN DAWN (10) is close to breaking through, last start finishing just half a length away in second over 1400m at Bendigo when he came from a long way back on straightening. Peaks now third up and looks a solid each-way price. GIVE SOME LIP (12) got home well at Pakenham Synthetic last start and comes back a notch in grade here. He'll need some luck from the inside but has strong claims. BLUE ISMAY (5) ran well enough fresh at Cranbourne in a BM62 and should be fitter, he should take holding out.
